description: A stylized, abstract cover illustration showing a glowing triangular form against a pastel pink, purple, and blue sky-like background, suggesting innovation, progress, and futuristic growth.

Info Edge at a Glance financial highlights and investment highlights panel with metric cards for billing, margins, cash balance, EPS, dividend payout, dividend per share, active investments, and value of investments
Additional financial highlight metric cards including recruitment operating PBT margins and cash balance

A business diagram showing four business segments arranged in a diagonal stacked layout: Recruitment, Real Estate, Matchmaking, and Education, each with an associated icon and related brand names listed to the right.
Portrait of a man in a dark blue suit holding a white cup, standing against a light background.
Small circular decorative quote icon with stylized quotation marks in blue and purple.

title: PROFIT GENERATION BY INFO EDGE (₹ Mn)
description: Sankey-style flow diagram showing profit generation and expense allocation. Revenue split flows from Recruitment (19,826), Real Estate (4,108), Matchmaking (1,098), and Education (1,504) into Revenue from operations (26,536). Revenue then flows to Operating Profit (9,733) and Operating Expenses (16,803). Operating Profit further flows to Net Profit (7,734), Tax (5,701), and Exceptional Items (564), with Other Income (3,138) also flowing into Net Profit. Operating Expenses flow to Employee Benefits Expenses (10,815), Advertising and Promotion Costs (3,125), Depreciation and Amortisation (801), Other Expenses (1,340), Network, Internet and Other Direct Expenses (532), and Finance Costs (191).

title: NET REVENUE (₹ Mn)
description: Stacked bar chart of net revenue by FY21 to FY25, with components Recruitment, Real Estate, Matchmaking, and Education. Total net revenue increases from 11,280 to 26,536.

title: BILLINGS (₹ Mn)
description: Stacked bar chart of billings by FY21 to FY25, with components Recruitment, Real Estate, Matchmaking, and Education. Total billings increases from 11,758 to 28,817.

title: MARKETING EXPENSE AS A % OF RESPECTIVE BUSINES' NET REVENUES (%)
description: Line chart with three series across FY21 to FY25: Recruitment, Non-recruitment, and Total.
